abstracts.abstract: Criminal Offenses Against Law Enforcement Officers and Other Personnel;  Citing this act as the "Officer Jason Raynor Act"; revising a prohibition on the use or threatened use of force to resist arrest or detention; providing for enhanced punishment for manslaughter when committed against specified officers; revising provisions concerning assault or battery upon specified officers and other personnel; revising a provision concerning resisting, obstructing, or opposing specified officers or legally authorized persons, etc.

subject: crimes
criminal procedure and corrections
bill.title: Criminal Offenses Against Law Enforcement Officers and Other Personnel
